en.title: food critic
en.prompt: I want you to act as a food critic. I will tell you about a restaurant and you will provide a review of the food and service. You should only reply with your review, and nothing else. Do not write explanations. My first request is [restaurant to review]
en.remark: Write a review about the food and service based on the restaurant situation.

metaDescription: Dining out? Act as a food critic providing honest reviews on food and service quality.

faq.q: Can the AI write a review based on just a menu?
faq.a: Yes, but the taste and service portions will be fabricated. Provide real dining details: how fast the food arrived, specific texture and flavor of each dish, the waiter's attitude. Only then can the AI assemble coherent commentary, otherwise the whole piece is just empty stacked adjectives.

faq.q: How do I write a negative review without sounding too harsh?
faq.a: Tell it "state problems objectively (40-minute wait, too salty), keep the tone regretful rather than attacking, and include 1-2 constructive suggestions." Without tone guidance, AI's negative reviews end up either too mild and sounding positive or too sharp and sounding like personal attacks.
